done.write_rule: only after immutable PASS receipt and all outputs are durably installed; no FAIL DONE

g2r_anchor_scores.row_order: wod_scene_anchor_domain stored order then candidate ordinal 1,2,3
g2r_anchor_scores.row_universe: each AVAILABLE wod_scene_anchor_domain row times candidate ordinals 1,2,3, retaining typed-NA terminal rows

g2r_availability_masks.row_order: cell_index ascending, segment_id raw UTF-8 ascending

g2r_blind_feature_bank.row_order: cell_index ascending, segment_id raw UTF-8 ascending, candidate ordinal 1,2,3

operation_receipt.publish_rule: immutable PASS or FAIL receipt; staged outputs publish only on PASS

wod_scene_anchor_domain.group_rule: AVAILABLE group has one or more unique ascending tau rows and no terminal row; terminal group has one NA-tau row and no AVAILABLE row

wod_scene_anchor_domain_manifest.path_mapping_sha256_binding: checksum-bound WOD path-type mapping manifest complete stored bytes

blind_scene_predicate.rule: for every one of the 320 canonical cells, candidate ordinals 1,2,3 are AVAILABLE, all three predictor values are finite, and the signed-zero-normalized exact binary64 three-value vector is nonconstant
blind_scene_predicate.support_id_preimage: each data segment_id as strict UTF-8 followed by LF including the final ID; zero bytes when empty

canonicalization.canonical_json: CPython 3.9 json.dumps(sort_keys=True,separators=(',',':'),ensure_ascii=False,allow_nan=False), strict UTF-8 without BOM, exactly one terminal LF
canonicalization.canonical_jsonl: one canonical_json row per line with no blank lines; exactly one LF after every row including the final row
canonicalization.csv: CPython 3.9 csv.writer dialect=excel, quoting=QUOTE_MINIMAL, lineterminator LF, strict UTF-8 without BOM; CR forbidden
canonicalization.float: finite IEEE-754 binary64 JSON; normalize -0.0 to 0.0 before comparison and serialization

hash_field_semantics.anchor_score_slice_sha256: SHA256 over the exact complete g2r_anchor_scores JSONL row bytes selected for that predictor cell, concatenated in source-file order without requiring contiguity; SHA256 of zero bytes when none
hash_field_semantics.anchor_slice_sha256: SHA256 over the exact complete g2r_anchor_scores JSONL row bytes selected for that cell, scene, and candidate, concatenated in source-file order without requiring contiguity; SHA256 of zero bytes when none
hash_field_semantics.availability_mask_slice_sha256: SHA256 over the predictor cell's exact contiguous g2r_availability_masks JSONL row bytes in stored order
hash_field_semantics.feature_bank_slice_sha256: SHA256 over the predictor cell's exact contiguous g2r_blind_feature_bank JSONL row bytes in stored order

canonicalization.selected_row_sha256: filter the source artifact by the named row identity, preserve source-file order, concatenate each selected complete stored row including its LF, and hash those bytes; never claim the rows are contiguous

deviation_contract.NEX: 0 when L<=v<=U; (L-v)/(M-L) when v<L; (v-U)/(U-M) when v>U
deviation_contract.NMD: (M-v)/(M-L) when v<M; 0 when v=M; (v-M)/(U-M) when v>M
deviation_contract.boundary_inclusivity: NEX is zero for L<=v<=U; v=M makes NMD zero
deviation_contract.derived_finiteness: NEX, NMD, and AMD must each be finite binary64; a strict interval whose half-width division overflows is invalid
deviation_contract.signed_zero: normalize -0.0 to 0.0 before storage, equality, and hashing
deviation_contract.validity: candidate IPV v and L,M,U must be finite, satisfy strict L<M<U, and produce finite NEX,NMD,AMD

required_golden_assertions: R04N and R10L use distinct row-duration H10 contexts while freezing exact current counterpart IPV, error, and last-five slope outputs
the checksum-bound selected counterpart is identical for C1,C2,C3 and missing, multiple, or drifted identity fails closed
primary M3 context bytes end at tau and are invariant to every strictly post-tau perturbation including LF, HF, and TF candidate futures
all 25 numeric fields match the recovered RQ012B formulas and the committed build_m3_anchor_features output on equivalent standardized history
kinematic category boundaries at 25 and 135 degrees, 6 meters, longitudinal-lateral equality, plus or minus 12 degrees, and plus or minus 2 meters are exact
the seven category tokens, all 32 names, order, types, canonical row bytes, and row SHA256 are exact
WOD path_type HO remains separate from the M3 geometry category and cannot enter the model as a direct-copy token
the four NC history-only fixtures and adversarial future perturbation preserve exact registered bytes and hashes

grid_contract.canonical_cell_id_preimage: strict UTF-8 cell_id followed by LF for every cell including the final cell

horizon_axis.rule: all integer tau ticks rate_hz through 2*rate_hz inclusive or one terminal group; no partial H20 set
integer tau ticks rate_hz through h_common_tick with complete registered windows; requires complete H20

sampling_axis.position_rule: native effective candidate ticks after frozen point-zero duplicate removal; history and counterpart linearly interpolated within support to the tstar-anchored 0.25-second grid
position-only absolute-time interpolation within support to the tstar-anchored 0.1-second grid including the tstar-to-first-candidate seam

m3_context_alignment.comparison_value: lane-v3 family-specific focal candidate IPV v
m3_context_alignment.interpretation: PI-approved WOD transfer/extrapolation, not a claim that each lane window reproduces the RQ009 five-row target label
m3_context_alignment.selection_rule: fixed while rating_access=NONE; rating-based selection or filtering is forbidden

m3_scoring_contract.environment: exact v4 package versions with reviewed managed-v4 portable parity
m3_scoring_contract.extraction: thin reviewed helper calling model.predict_tier_quantiles plus calibrated_bounds without changing scorer bytes
m3_scoring_contract.parity: rtol=0.0 and atol=1e-7 per frozen portable fixture ae62b9fddba53308d319ccef5a70d56a9f0ae243fe009aa3f85e36cb20fcee37 and tests/test_verifier_runtime.py:152; bit-exact cross-platform bytes are not required

manifest_and_receipt_rules.atomic_publication: stage all outputs outside immutable final paths; validate complete set; publish only the complete PASS set without overwrite

operation_receipt.done: PASS only after all outputs and receipt are durable
operation_receipt.pass: terminal_cell_count=320, NC gate PASS, every hash/count identity valid, forbidden counts zero, output manifest COMPLETE
operation_receipt.pre_runtime_failure: nonzero abort with no receipt and no DONE
operation_receipt.runtime_failure: immutable FAIL receipt, typed-NA output manifest, no DONE, no staged-output publication

nc_pretstar_history_only_gate.construction: build once before candidate forking and copy the completed payload hash to candidate ordinals 1,2,3 without recomputation
nc_pretstar_history_only_gate.effect: global abort before rating access; no association/control row and no ranking effect
nc_pretstar_history_only_gate.fixture_numeric_array_encoding: every numeric array element is an exact IEEE-754 hexadecimal string; fixture JSON is canonical sorted compact UTF-8 plus one LF
nc_pretstar_history_only_gate.future_perturbation: replace candidate and ego futures with three distinct finite adversarial trajectories and require exact equality of state bytes, focal-reference bytes, counterpart-reference bytes, IPV bytes, terminal status, and candidate payload hashes
nc_pretstar_history_only_gate.m3_context_payload: exact trailing at-most-10 state rows ending at tau; scorer-independent and inaccessible to all strictly-post-tau state
nc_pretstar_history_only_gate.source: closed [-W,0] shared observed ego and selected-counterpart history only

precedence: recovery_lane_v3 controls G2R axes, deviations, readouts, masks, order, NC gate, and the G2R/G3R boundary
envelope_builder_contract_v2 controls only safe-primitive timeline/state and scene-anchor-domain clauses
m3_feature_spec_contract controls the 32-column model order and output names
config_space_v1p6 and execution_contract_v1p5 retain M3 lineage, environment, rating boundary, and operation DENY
this contract supplements the source bindings with the PI-approved WOD port and physical artifact bytes

readout_contract.reduction: physical-time trapezoid integral divided by common duration
physical-time trapezoid integral divided by common duration
physical-time trapezoid integral divided by common duration

status_contract.candidate_selection: AVAILABLE only when all required anchor rows are finite; otherwise choose smallest reason_priority then reason_code raw UTF-8
status_contract.cell_nonfatal_terminal_selection: TERMINAL with F_AVAILABLE_CONTINUE when no candidate failure exists; otherwise choose the smallest reason_priority, then segment_id raw UTF-8, then candidate_ordinal, then reason_code raw UTF-8; only registered global-fatal mappings produce CELL_FATAL
status_contract.global_abort_rule: only authority, schema, contract, artifact hash, anchor-domain integrity, status-rollup integrity, NC leakage-gate, or final output-integrity failures globally abort; no rating or G3 status is registered
status_contract.scene_cell_status: AVAILABLE only when all three candidate rows are AVAILABLE; otherwise choose smallest reason_priority, then candidate_ordinal, then reason_code raw UTF-8

finite_float.value: finite JSON binary64 number with -0.0 normalized to 0.0

agent_type_pair.eligibility: selected counterpart must have vehicle class

geometry_path_category.rule: absolute wrapped heading difference <25 degrees gives F; >135 degrees gives CP; otherwise MP

geometry_path_relation.rule: same-direction gives F; opposing/crossing gives O-C when ego-frame lateral separation <6 meters else C-C; mixed gives P-M when abs(longitudinal)>=abs(lateral) else P-P

priority_role.rule: counterpart longitudinal projection in ego frame; abs(longitudinal)<2 meters equal, positive yield, negative priority

turn_pair_label.rule: per agent unwrap last-at-most-10 headings; delta>=+12 degrees L, delta<=-12 degrees R, otherwise S; serialize exactly as ego_label + '-' + counterpart_label

vehicle_type_list.eligibility: selected counterpart must have vehicle class

columns_in_order.method: anchor physical timestamp minus explicit earliest jointly-supported resampled context timestamp, shared across candidates when their pre-tstar support is identical
columns_in_order.name: elapsed_time_s

columns_in_order.method: count eligible rows in the trailing at-most-10-row M3 context
columns_in_order.name: history_row_count

columns_in_order.method: window-local ego x finite difference at the M3 context anchor
columns_in_order.name: ego_vx_anchor

columns_in_order.method: window-local ego y finite difference at the M3 context anchor
columns_in_order.name: ego_vy_anchor

columns_in_order.method: window-local ego heading with moving threshold, carry/backfill, all-stationary failure, and -pi to +pi normalization
columns_in_order.name: ego_heading_anchor

columns_in_order.method: window-local selected-counterpart x finite difference at the M3 context anchor
columns_in_order.name: counterpart_vx_anchor

columns_in_order.method: window-local selected-counterpart y finite difference at the M3 context anchor
columns_in_order.name: counterpart_vy_anchor

columns_in_order.method: window-local selected-counterpart heading under the frozen WOD rules
columns_in_order.name: counterpart_heading_anchor

columns_in_order.method: counterpart_x minus ego_x
columns_in_order.name: relative_dx_anchor

columns_in_order.method: counterpart_y minus ego_y
columns_in_order.name: relative_dy_anchor

columns_in_order.method: Euclidean norm of relative_dx_anchor and relative_dy_anchor
columns_in_order.name: relative_distance_anchor

columns_in_order.method: counterpart_vx minus ego_vx
columns_in_order.name: relative_dvx_anchor

columns_in_order.method: counterpart_vy minus ego_vy
columns_in_order.name: relative_dvy_anchor

columns_in_order.method: Euclidean norm of relative_dvx_anchor and relative_dvy_anchor
columns_in_order.name: relative_speed_anchor

columns_in_order.method: negative radial velocity; exactly 0 when distance is at most 1e-9
columns_in_order.name: closing_rate_anchor

columns_in_order.method: counterpart heading minus ego heading wrapped into [-pi,pi)
columns_in_order.name: heading_difference_anchor

columns_in_order.method: NumPy mean of relative distance over the standardized trailing M3 context
columns_in_order.name: relative_distance_mean_wx

columns_in_order.method: population standard deviation ddof=0 of relative distance over the standardized trailing M3 context
columns_in_order.name: relative_distance_std_wx

columns_in_order.method: NumPy mean of relative speed over the standardized trailing M3 context
columns_in_order.name: relative_speed_mean_wx

columns_in_order.method: NumPy mean of closing rate over the standardized trailing M3 context
columns_in_order.name: closing_rate_mean_wx

columns_in_order.method: distance divided by positive closing rate capped at 20 seconds; typed NA when nonfinite or closing rate at most 1e-9
columns_in_order.name: closing_ttc_anchor

columns_in_order.method: constant-velocity least-squares arrival-time difference with 20-second and 5-meter validity bounds; typed NA on invalid solve
columns_in_order.name: apet_online_proxy

columns_in_order.method: counterpart column 1 from exact pair estimator on the causal H10 window ending at the M3 context anchor
columns_in_order.name: counterpart_ipv_current

columns_in_order.method: counterpart error column 1 from the same exact causal pair-estimator call
columns_in_order.name: counterpart_ipv_error_current

columns_in_order.method: median pairwise dy/dt over the last at-most-five finite causal counterpart-IPV values and actual times with abs(dt)>1e-12
columns_in_order.name: counterpart_ipv_slope_pre_anchor

columns_in_order.method: per-anchor actual-trajectory heading heuristic: F below 25 degrees, CP above 135 degrees, otherwise MP
columns_in_order.name: geometry_path_category

columns_in_order.method: paired per-anchor kinematic relation heuristic; WOD path type remains a separate field
columns_in_order.name: geometry_path_relation

columns_in_order.method: ego and counterpart last-at-most-10-row unwrapped heading deltas classified at inclusive plus/minus 12 degrees and serialized as ego_label + '-' + counterpart_label
columns_in_order.name: turn_pair_label

columns_in_order.method: literal HV;HV after selected-counterpart vehicle-class eligibility
columns_in_order.name: agent_type_pair

columns_in_order.method: literal ['HV', 'HV'] after selected-counterpart vehicle-class eligibility
columns_in_order.name: vehicle_type_list

columns_in_order.method: literal all_HV
columns_in_order.name: av_included

columns_in_order.method: counterpart displacement projected on ego heading: abs(longitudinal)<2 meters is equal, positive is yield, negative is priority
columns_in_order.name: priority_role

wod_to_m3_feature_contract.counterpart_identity: consume exactly one exported checksum-bound counterpart_track_id per segment and pair it with C1,C2,C3; no reselection or fallback
wod_to_m3_feature_contract.elapsed_time_origin: earliest jointly-supported resampled context tick for the sampling branch, shared across candidates when their pre-tstar support is identical; passed explicitly even when the final context is cropped

m3_input_row_preimage.serialization: CPython 3.9 json.dumps(sort_keys=True,separators=(',',':'),ensure_ascii=False,allow_nan=False), strict UTF-8 without BOM, plus exactly one terminal LF
m3_input_row_preimage.sha256_preimage: all serialized bytes including terminal LF
m3_input_row_preimage.values_rule: parallel length-32 array of finite binary64 JSON numbers with -0.0 normalized to 0.0, exact UTF-8 category strings, or typed NA

numeric_feature_formulas.formula: count(eligible rows in trailing at-most-10-row context)
numeric_feature_formulas.name: history_row_count

numeric_feature_formulas.formula: typed_NA if nonfinite or closing_rate_anchor<=1e-9 else min(relative_distance_anchor/closing_rate_anchor,20.0)
numeric_feature_formulas.name: closing_ttc_anchor

numeric_feature_formulas.formula: typed_NA unless finite nonstationary least-squares arrival times are each in [0,20] and predicted conflict points are within 5 meters; otherwise abs(t_ego-t_counterpart)
numeric_feature_formulas.name: apet_online_proxy

numeric_feature_formulas.formula: median((ipv_j-ipv_i)/(time_j-time_i)) over all finite pairs in last at-most-five points with abs(time_j-time_i)>1e-12
numeric_feature_formulas.name: counterpart_ipv_slope_pre_anchor
